title: Cache invalidation
description: Given a table loaded from a directory, when files on disk change (modified, added, deleted), the cache should detect staleness via two-tier mtime checking. JIT refresh happens automatically before query results are returned. Configurable: check_interval prevents re-checking within the interval; auto_refresh=False disables JIT refresh, requiring explicit warm() calls. Spec: features/cache/cache_invalidation.feature
